message:
feat(info,store,config): real memory reporting, list encoding config, conformance fixes

- INFO memory: report real used_memory from Store::estimate_memory_usage_bytes()
  instead of hardcoded zeros; show live maxmemory_policy, real dirty counter
  in persistence section, real expires count in keyspace section
- Add list_max_listpack_size field to Store (default -2, matching Redis)
  with CONFIG GET/SET support for list-max-listpack-size and list-max-ziplist-size
- Update OBJECT ENCODING for lists to use byte-based threshold from
  list_max_listpack_size (-1=4kb, -2=8kb, -3=16kb, -4=32kb, -5=64kb)
- Add format_bytes_human() for human-readable memory display in INFO
- Add AnyBulk variant to conformance ExpectedFrame for dynamic content matching
- Replace unwrap() with expect() in CONFIG SET parameter lookup
- Update core_server.json fixture for dynamic INFO sections and new encoding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
